section_title: SYNTHETIC M4-T003 engine-hardening demonstration (NOT an official capture)

source.verification_required: SYNTHETIC - NOT captured from any official source. Exists only to exercise M4-T003 engine capabilities (effective-date temporal version selection and a compliance pass/fail determination). Values are illustrative and must never be used as a legal statement; a real rule requires official capture + G6 approval.
